# Google Fonts MCP — Complete Agent Reference

> 1,923 fonts, 73 pairings, 8 scales. Install: `uvx google-fonts-mcp`
> Repo: https://github.com/sliday/google-fonts-skill
> Gallery: https://sliday.github.io/google-fonts-skill/

## Type Scales (8)

| Scale | Ratio | Best For | Mood |
|-------|-------|----------|------|
| minor-second | 1.067 | Dense UI, dashboards, data-heavy apps | compact, functional, dense |
| major-second | 1.125 | Apps, admin panels, documentation | balanced, professional, readable |
| minor-third | 1.2 | Balanced content, general purpose, portfolios | calm, balanced, approachable |
| major-third | 1.25 | Blogs, content sites, long-form reading | readable, approachable, editorial |
| perfect-fourth | 1.333 | Marketing sites, editorial, landing pages | bold, confident, structured |
| augmented-fourth | 1.414 | Editorial, magazines, expressive designs | dramatic, expressive, bold |
| perfect-fifth | 1.5 | Display-heavy, posters, hero sections | powerful, commanding, dramatic |
| golden-ratio | 1.618 | Hero sections, artistic, maximum impact | luxurious, aspirational, grand |

## MCP Tools

### search_fonts
- query: str — description, mood, or use case
- mode: single (default) | pair | scale
- tier: A | B | C (single mode only)
- max_results: int (default 5)

### generate_typography_system
- heading: str — heading font name
- body: str (optional, defaults to heading)
- scale: minor-second | major-second | minor-third | major-third | perfect-fourth | augmented-fourth | perfect-fifth | golden-ratio
- base: int (default 16)
- format: css | tailwind | embed | all
- Returns: {css, tailwind, embed}

### lookup_font
- name: str — exact font name

### list_scales
- Returns all 8 scales

### list_pairings
- category: str (optional) — filter by contrast type

## Quick Decision Guide

| Project Type | Mode | Scale | Search |
|-------------|------|-------|--------|
| SaaS / Dashboard | single | major-second | clean professional geometric |
| Blog / Content | pair | major-third | editorial readable |
| Marketing / Landing | pair | perfect-fourth | bold modern confident |
| Luxury / Fashion | pair | augmented-fourth | elegant premium serif |
| Documentation | single | minor-third | readable accessible humanist |
| E-commerce | pair | minor-third | clean friendly conversion |
| Portfolio | pair | perfect-fourth | creative distinctive |
| Enterprise / Gov | single | major-second | trustworthy accessible corporate |
